text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Mejiro Bright and I visit the shrine to
pray for her condition to improve.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thank you for coming along today.
choice_data_list: Right, let's go purify our hands.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Just a moment... We ought to calm our spirits
beforehand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We'll soon be in the presence of the divine, so
our minds must be pure as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now, hold the ladle in your right hand and wash
your left hand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Next, take the ladle in your cleansed left hand...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now that our minds and bodies are pristine, let's
make our way through the torii gate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our very traditional shrine visit continues exactly
in line with the proper etiquette...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That concludes our shrine visit. Thank you once
again for accompanying me.
choice_data_list: That shrine visit was very... proper.
That shrine visit was very... proper.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But of course! Given my condition of late, I wish
to do everything I possibly can to hasten my
recovery.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I shall soar to great heights someday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But simply reaching those heights won't do. I must
be elegant, magnificent, and dignified every step
of the way as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family, that is
my aspiration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Being in slightly worse-than-usual condition is no
excuse for slovenly behavior in public.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. And it's just the kind of logic
I've come to expect from Mejiro Bright. In which
case, I want nothing more than to help her reach
those heights.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hippity-hop, hippity-hop, hippity-hop. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Have you noticed? ♪ The cloud that was hanging
over me has lifted!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I absolutely must extend my gratitude. Trainer,
would you join me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's feeling better again. I have to show how
thankful I am too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright suddenly loses her balance and
stumbles a little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I sincerely apologize... I suddenly felt rather
lightheaded there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she was standing for so long that she
lost her balance.
choice_data_list: Let's call it a day and go home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I suppose these things do take time after
all.
